userStories.title: Inspect schema - confirm sujeto_obligado storage strategy
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='documento_interpretativo' AND column_name IN ('sujeto_obligado','metadata') ORDER BY column_name" && test -f docs/schema-documento-interpretativo.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Map sujeto_obligado for all 141 CNMV rows
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; NULL_COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documento_interpretativo WHERE organismo_emisor='CNMV' AND (sujeto_obligado IS NULL OR sujeto_obligado::text = '{}' OR (metadata->>'sujeto_obligado') IS NULL) AND tipo_documento NOT IN ('registro_cnmv')"); echo "CNMV rows without sujeto_obligado: $NULL_COUNT"; [ "$NULL_COUNT" -eq 0 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Link normativa_esi_cnmv to obligacion_perfil
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil op JOIN norma n ON n.codigo=op.norma_codigo WHERE n.tipo_norma='circular_cnmv' OR op.norma_codigo ILIKE 'CNMV%'"); echo "CNMV obligacion_perfil rows: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 6 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Structure modelo_esi_cnmv - add cnmv_obligation_link entries
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cnmv_obligation_link WHERE tipo_obligacion='modelo_normalizado_esi'"); echo "ESI model links: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 8 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Add CNMV endpoint - get documents by perfil
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_cnmv_perfil.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Expose CNMV perfil endpoint in MCP - add to mcp_catalog
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_mcp_cnmv_tool.py -v 2>&1 | tail -10 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Update mcp_validation_suite - CNMV quality checks
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification - Sprint L complete
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep 'passed' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documento_interpretativo WHERE organismo_emisor='CNMV' AND sujeto_obligado IS NOT NULL" | grep -vE '^0$' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
